definition:
δημιουργός, -οῦ, ὑ
 (δῆμος, ἔργον), [in LXX: 2Ma.4:1 * ;] 
  1. one who works for the people. 
   2. Univ., an author, builder, maker; the maker of the world (Xen., Mem., I, 4, 9, al.), Heb.11:10.†
 SYN.: κτίστης, creator, τεχνίτης, craftsman, designer. In He, l.with, τ. has reference to the plan, δ. to its execution. (AS)
